summary: CI workflow lacks coverage for metaswarm-specific tests; depth-guard and smoke-test scripts are not executed. Changelog order check exists but does not enforce changelog updates per PR.

gaps.notes: Script enforces forbidden tools and metaswarm invariants; currently not automated in CI.
Script validates metaswarm contracts (fleet.json, swarm-state.json, child-agents.jsonl) and full 250 worker constraints; not run in CI.

gaps.ci_reference: Changelog order check present in ci.yml
gaps.notes: CI verifies version order only; does not enforce changelog updates per PR or version bump requirement.

recommendations: Add CI step: bash tests/smoke-test.sh (ensure tmux/agent requirements available or mock agent)
If desired, add PR-level changelog enforcement (e.g., diff check or required version bump).

sources.note: Depth Guard lint script exists; not invoked in CI.
Metaswarm smoke test script exists; not invoked in CI.
CI steps do not include depth-guard-lint.sh or smoke-test.sh; includes changelog order check.
